description: pipeline-snapshot skill included Past Due Opps as a data pull and reported all-Improving pipeline totals. David does not care about past due opps (operational detail, Don handles it) and only cares about One Texas (Dallas + South Texas), not all of Improving.
correction: pipeline-snapshot scope is One Texas only (Dallas TX + South Texas). Always filter before reading. Remove Past Due Opps entirely — that is Don's operational layer, not David's funnel-filling view.
systemic_fix: Rewrote pipeline-snapshot skill: removed Past Due Opps step, added explicit One Texas only scope note, changed output format to always show Dallas + South Texas + combined One Texas column. Never show unfiltered all-Improving numbers.
